arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim: Man Utd a better team with Marcus Rashford – but he has to change
arts.sum: The 27-year-old trained with his team-mates on Wednesday but was omitted from the 21-man squad travelling to Romania.

arts.ttl: Rashford 'must change' before Man Utd return - Amorim
arts.sum: Marcus Rashford "has to change" before he will be allowed to return to action for Manchester United, says head coach Ruben Amorim.

arts.ttl: Marcus Rashford offered olive branch by Ruben Amorim with late Man United exit complicated
arts.sum: Manchester United head coach Ruben Amorim says that Marcus Rashford "has to change" if he is to represent the club again.

arts.ttl: Team News: FCSB vs. Manchester United injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Thursday's Europa League clash between FCSB and Manchester United.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim offers Marcus Rashford route back to Manchester United first team - but there's a catch
arts.sum: Marcus Rashford is absent from the Man Utd squad that travelled to Romania to face FCSB in the Europa League, but he has been offered the hint of an olive branch by Ruben Amorim.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim doubles down on why he is leaving Marcus Rashford out of Man United's squad... insisting exiled star must CHANGE to get back in
arts.sum: CHRIS WHEELER IN BUCHAREST: Marcus Rashford will miss his 12th game in a row when Manchester United face Steaua Bucharest in the Europa League on Thursday night.

arts.ttl: Man Utd predicted lineup vs FCSB - Europa League
arts.sum: Man Utd's predicted lineup against FCSB in the Europa League on Thursday.

arts.ttl: Alejandro Garnacho future: Chelsea, Napoli interest has 'lulled' in Manchester United attacker
arts.sum: Chelsea and Napoli's interest in Manchester United forward Alejandro Garnacho has reportedly "lulled", raising the prospect that the Argentine could remain at Old Trafford.

arts.ttl: Barcelona open transfer talks with Manchester United
arts.sum: The brass at La Liga giants Barcelona have kicked into gear a fresh round of transfer discussions with their counterparts at Manchester United. That’s according to Mundo Deportivo, citing The…

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim doubles down on brutal Marcus Rashford dig with fresh swipe at Man Utd star
arts.sum: Marcus Rashford has not featured in United's last 12 games and was not part of the 21-man squad that flew to Bucharest for Thursday night's final Europa League group game against FCSB
